title: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler
move_pattern: Starts with First Acid Goop, then cycles every 3 turns: Acid Goop → Inhale → Acid Goop → repeat.
notes: Inhale applies 7 Strength to the Fuzzy Wurm Crawler each time it is used. Strength stacks permanently, so Acid Goop deals 13 damage after the first Inhale, 20 after the second, and continues scaling throughout a prolonged fight.
